prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年最低位次约189→261→243→325→394，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约151名；2025年基准约394名，为近5年最高位次（数字最大），反映竞争 逐年加剧；本省计划2021-2024年均为4人，2025年增至5人；2026年计划8人，较2025年扩招60%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 9 85、211、双一流；浙江大学软科主榜约第3名，医学院为浙江大学核心院系，层次极高，对高分考生吸引力强；浙江大学（主校）2026年声誉偏负面，但医学院 作为独立招生单位受影响较小；抖音热度排名第14（高热），报考关注度高；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学A、基础医学A-、药学A+等，与招生专业（临床 医学、医学试验班类）直接对应，学科实力顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续偏热（2024年），口腔医学偏热（72.31）；本省2026年考生 总数154000人，较2025年大幅增长约35%，竞争加剧；浙江大学医学院位于浙江杭州，属东部发达地区，对内蒙古考生有较强地 域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招60%及本省考生总数显著增长约35%，扩招缓解竞争但 考生增长加剧竞争，两者对冲后预计位次仍小幅后移；预测最低位次约556名，区间489-623名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学
- 医学试验班类（含临床医学、口腔医学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）（包含专业。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间489-623名内，建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（489以内）可重点冲刺一档临床医学（5+3一体化）；位次接近区间上限（623 左右）建议以三档巴德年医学班为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately changed from 189 → 261 → 243 → 325 → 394, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 151 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 394, the highest ranking (largest number) in the past 5 years, reflecting intensifying competition year by year; the provincial plan was 4 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 8 students, a 60% increase compared to 2025, a significant expansion that helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Zhejiang University ranks about 3rd on the Soft Science main list, and the School of Medicine is a core college of Zhejiang University, with an extremely high level and strong appeal to high-scoring students; Zhejiang University (main campus) has a slightly negative reputation in 2026, but the School of Medicine, as an independent enrollment unit, is less affected; Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with high application attention; no obvious record of admission gaps; Clinical Medicine A, Basic Medicine A-, Pharmacy A+, etc., directly correspond to the enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine, Medical Experimental Class), with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine major continues to be hot (2024), Oral Medicine is relatively hot (72.31); the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 154,000, a significant increase of about 35% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, an eastern developed region, which has strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 60% expansion of the 2026 plan, and the notable 35% increase in the total number of candidates in the province, the expansion alleviates competition but the increase in candidates intensifies it; after offsetting, the ranking is expected to still shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 556, with a range of 489-623.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Clinical Medicine
- Medical Experimental Class (including Clinical Medicine, Oral Medicine).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Ba De Nian Medical Class) (includes majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 489-623, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 for a stretch, and Tier 3 as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 489), focus on Tier 1 Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 623), it is recommended to choose Tier 3 Ba De Nian Medical Class as a safe option.
